transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you joining the debate club meeting after class today?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. They're discussing this year's competition topics, and I want to participate.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

choices.text: To learn about this year's competition topics.
To practice for an English exam.

questions.explanation: She says the club will discuss this year's competition topics and she wants to participate.
questions.evidence: They're discussing this year's competition topics, and I want to participate.
